rationale.R1.1: Identifies the core issue (LLM bias towards verbose SQL) but doesn't fully articulate a novel framing solution.
rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work on LLM bias but lacks specific comparison to existing debiasing methods.
rationale.RX.1: Does not demonstrate awareness of uncertainty in the proposed method.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, but the 'covered_dims' claim is too vague and doesn't specify which dimensions are covered.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified, assuming the debiasing process does not introduce new issues.
rationale.RX.5: No evidence of provenance or traceability provided in the revised introduction.
